mano_cua.result_summary: HLS视频(m3u8)加载播放正常，muted复选框可正常勾选/取消，视频播放不中断。但State面板未显示muted字段，浏览器标签页在静音时仍显示音频活动图标（可能是浏览器HLS行为或muted未完全传播），无法通过GUI完全确认实际静音效果。整体功能表现正常。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: HLS video loaded and played successfully. Muted checkbox found, checked/unchecked properly. Video continued playing while muted. State panel doesn't expose muted field. Browser tab icon showed audio activity during mute - could be browser behavior or propagation issue. Overall mute toggle functionality appears working.
